typed-byte-add-bad.error: eval error: parameter `a`: 300 does not conform to type `u8`

syntax-commas.code:
// commas optional — these are the same list
[1 2 3]

syntax-if-arity.code:
// 'If' has arity 3; it reads the next three forms, no parens needed.
If gt(10 3) "bigger" "smaller"

eval-fn-scalar.code:
Def square Fn {n} mul(n n)
square(9)

eval-twice.code:
Def twice Fn {f x} f(f(x))
Def inc Fn {n} add(n 1)
twice(inc 10)

eval-apply-list.code:
Def ops [Fn {n} add(n 1)  Fn {n} mul(n 2)]
apply(get(ops 1) 21)

sf-fn-adder.code:
Def adder Fn {by}
  Fn {n} add(n by)
Def add5 adder(5)
add5(10)

sf-if-nonbool.error: eval error: If condition must be a bool, got 1

sf-match.code:
Match [1 2 3] [
  ([]        "empty")
  ([x]       str-cat("one: " to-string(x)))
  ([x y z]   str-cat("three, head " to-string(x)))
  (other     "something else")
]

sf-the-bad.error: eval error: The: 9000 does not conform to type `s8`

pm-record.code:
Match {name: "Ada" born: 1815 field: "maths"} [
  ({name: n born: y}  str-cat(n " (" to-string(y) ")"))
  (other              "no match")
]

pm-no-clause.error: eval error: no Match clause for 5

tail-count-down.code:
Def count-down Fn {n}
  If eq(n 0)
     "liftoff"
     count-down(sub(n 1))     // tail position — constant stack
count-down(100000)

tail-sum-to.code:
Def sum-to Fn {n acc}
  If eq(n 0)
     acc
     sum-to(sub(n 1) add(acc n))
sum-to(10000 0)

std-arith.code: [add(2 3)  sub(10 4)  mul(6 7)  div(17 5)  rem(17 5)  neg(8)  abs(-3)  min(4 9)  max(4 9)]

std-div-zero.error: eval error: `div`: integer overflow or division by zero

std-form-kind.code: [form-kind(42)  form-kind("hi")  form-kind(Quote foo)  form-kind(Quote foo(1))  form-kind(ok(1))  form-kind([1 2])]

std-cells.code:
Let {c: cell-new(0)}
  Do [cell-set(c 41)
      cell-set(c add(cell-get(c) 1))
      cell-get(c)]
